emails.subject: Re: CAISO deals past April '02
emails.body: Re: CAISO deals past April '02 How many times will I have to remind them? Mike Driscoll added comments on both these deals they would definitely like the special language added in the confirm letter. Thanks, Kate Kimberly Hundl@ENRON 12/12/2000 02:01 PM

emails.subject: CAISO deals past April '02
emails.body: CAISO deals past April '02 Hi Kate! I have two deals that extent past April 2002 (Deal #478879 #478878). The traders didn't enter any comments about special CAISO language to be entered. Will you ask them if they want us to enter that language? Thanks! Kim
